violations.text: The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit (rinse temperature of 180 degrees F) was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. Establishment will switch to plastic drinkware and/or use the 3-bay sink to sanitize until dishwasher is serviced and reaching proper sanitizing temperature. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2026
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2026

Thermometers are lacking in the refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2025
The ceiling in the walk-in cooler is in poor repair. Paint is peeling. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025
